title: Data Quality Monitoring
description: An agent for governed data quality scoring, trends, and root-cause insights.

title: Ask Your Data
description: Natural language data exploration -- SQL generation, visualizations, query logic.

title: Intelligent Document Mapping Agent
description: Extracts, maps, and standardizes data from documents to streamline workflows.

title: Revenue Leakage Agent
description: An intelligent agent that detects, analyzes, and resolves revenue leakage across billing, contracts, and transactions to protect enterprise margins.

title: Repository Analysis Agent
description: An intelligent agent that analyzes code repositories to surface insights, identify patterns, assess quality, and accelerate engineering decision-making at scale.
